chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1725 of 2025 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.8589/2025 2.For hearing of main case. 23.05.2025 Mr.Maaz Waheed, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Faheem Raza, Advocate for Respondent. Ms.Motia Shah, Deputy Commissioner, MTO Zone-II Karachi is present. Comments filed on behalf of Respondent Nos.2 and 3 is taken on record. Ms.Motia Shah, Deputy Commissioner, MTO Zone-II Karachi is present and she states that the two impugned notices and the subsequent notice are being withdrawn forthwith without prejudice to the right of the respondent to initiate any proceedings as may be permissible under the law. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that in view hereof the petition appears to have served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
